languages.text: "Ну, официально мы — взвод снабжения. То есть добываем ресурсы для выживания Клети. А еще каждый из нас должен уметь что-то сам делать. Ну в ядах там разбираться, патроны штамповать или лазбатареи перезаряжать. Мы — снабженцы, а значит, лучшие из лучших".

"Well, officially we're a supply platoon. That is, we gather the resources that the Cage needs to survive. And each of us has to have some special skill. Like knowing about poisons, making ammo, or recharging power packs for las weapons. We're supply troops and that means we're the best of the best."
languages.original_text: "Ну, официально мы — взвод снабжения. То есть добываем ресурсы для выживания Клети. А еще каждый из нас должен уметь что-то сам делать. Ну в ядах там разбираться, патроны штамповать или лазбатареи перезаряжать. Мы — снабженцы, а значит, лучшие из лучших".

traits.locale_text: "Well, officially we're a supply platoon. That is, we mine the resources that the Cage needs to survive. And each of us has to have some skill that's our own. Like knowing about poisons, making ammo, or recharging power packs for las weapons. We're supply troops and that means we're the best of the best."

"Well, officially we're a supply platoon. That is, we gather the resources that the Cage needs to survive. And each of us has to have some special skill. Like knowing about poisons, making ammo, or recharging power packs for las weapons. We're supply troops and that means we're the best of the best."

"Well, officially we're a supply platoon. That is, we mine the resources that Tsar-Cage needs to survive. And each of us has to have some skill that's our own. Like knowing about poisons, making ammo, or recharging lasbatteries. But don't be fooled. Just because we're supply troops doesn't mean we can't fight as well as anyone else."

languages.text: 「まあ、正式には補給中隊です。つまり、ツァー・ケージが生き残るために必要な資源を採掘するのです。そして、毒の知識や弾薬の製造、レーザー電池の充電など、それぞれが持つ独自のスキルが必要です。でも、騙されないでください。補給中隊だからといって、他の兵士たちと同じように戦えないわけではありません」
languages.original_text: "Well, officially we're a supply platoon. That is, we mine the resources that Tsar-Cage needs to survive. And each of us has to have some skill that's our own. Like knowing about poisons, making ammo, or recharging lasbatteries. But don't be fooled. Just because we're supply troops doesn't mean we can't fight as well as anyone else."

languages.text: "Resmî olarak biz ikmal müfrezesiyiz. Yani, Kafes'in ayakta kalması için gereken kaynakları topluyoruz. Her birimizin özel bir yeteneği olmak zorunda. Zehirler hakkında bilgi sahibi olmak, cephane yapmak veya lazer silahlarının güç kaynaklarını şarj etmek gibi. Fakat kanmayın. İkmal birlikleriyiz, diğer herkesten daha iyiyiz."
languages.original_text: "Well, officially we're a supply platoon. That is, we gather the resources that the Cage needs to survive. And each of us has to have some special skill. Like knowing about poisons, making ammo, or recharging power packs for las weapons. We're supply troops and that means we're the best of the best."

traits.locale_text: "Resmî olarak biz ikmal müfrezesiyiz. Yani, Kafes'in ayakta kalması için gereken kaynakları topluyoruz. Her birimizin özel bir yeteneği olmak zorunda. Zehirler hakkında bilgi sahibi olmak, cephane yapmak veya lazer silahlarının güç kaynaklarını şarj etmek gibi. Fakat kanmayın. İkmal birlikleriyiz, diğer herkesten daha iyiyiz."

languages.text: “嗯，名义上我们是后勤排。也就是说，我们负责收集牢笼赖以生存的物资。而且，我们每个人都得有点拿手的绝活。比如精通毒物、弹药制造，或是能给激光武器的电池组充电。我们是补给兵，那也就意味着，我们是精英中的精英。”
languages.original_text: "Well, officially we're a supply platoon. That is, we gather the resources that the Cage needs to survive. And each of us has to have some special skill. Like knowing about poisons, making ammo, or recharging power packs for las weapons. We're supply troops and that means we're the best of the best."

traits.locale_text: “嗯，名义上我们是后勤排。也就是说，我们负责收集牢笼赖以生存的物资。而且，我们每个人都得有点拿手的绝活。比如精通毒物、弹药制造，或是能给激光武器的电池组充电。我们是补给兵，那也就意味着，我们是精英中的精英。”

languages.text: "Tja, offiziell sind wir ein Versorgungszug. Das heißt, wir sammeln die Rohstoffe, die der Käfig zum Überleben braucht. Und jeder von uns muss ein besonderes Talent haben. Wie man Gift oder Munition herstellt zum Beispiel, oder wie man Energiezellen von Laserwaffen auflädt. Wir versorgen die Truppe, das heißt, wir sind die Besten der Besten."
languages.original_text: "Well, officially we're a supply platoon. That is, we gather the resources that the Cage needs to survive. And each of us has to have some special skill. Like knowing about poisons, making ammo, or recharging power packs for las weapons. We're supply troops and that means we're the best of the best."

traits.locale_text: "Tja, offiziell sind wir ein Versorgungszug. Das heißt, wir sammeln die Rohstoffe, die der Käfig zum Überleben braucht. Und jeder von uns muss ein besonderes Talent haben. Wie man Gift oder Munition herstellt zum Beispiel, oder wie man Energiezellen von Laserwaffen auflädt. Wir versorgen die Truppe, das heißt, wir sind die Besten der Besten."

languages.text: « Officiellement, nous sommes responsables de l'approvisionnement. Autrement dit, nous récupérons les ressources dont la Cage a besoin pour survivre. Chacun de nous doit également être doté d'une compétence spécifique. Nous avons ainsi dans nos rangs un spécialiste des poisons, un fabricant de munitions et même un préposé au rechargement des batteries laser. Du fait du rôle que nous devons jouer, nous sommes les meilleurs des meilleurs. »
languages.original_text: "Well, officially we're a supply platoon. That is, we gather the resources that the Cage needs to survive. And each of us has to have some special skill. Like knowing about poisons, making ammo, or recharging power packs for las weapons. We're supply troops and that means we're the best of the best."

traits.locale_text: « Officiellement, nous sommes responsables de l'approvisionnement. Autrement dit, nous récupérons les ressources dont la Cage a besoin pour survivre. Chacun de nous doit également être doté d'une compétence spécifique. Nous avons ainsi dans nos rangs un spécialiste des poisons, un fabricant de munitions et même un préposé au rechargement des batteries laser. Du fait du rôle que nous devons jouer, nous sommes les meilleurs des meilleurs. »

languages.text: «Bueno, oficialmente, somos un pelotón de aprovisionamiento, es decir, que extraemos los recursos necesarios para que la Jaula siga en pie. Además, cada uno tiene alguna habilidad propia especial, como entender de venenos, fabricar munición o recargar baterías de arma láser. Somos tropas de aprovisionamiento, y eso significa que somos los mejores de los mejores».
languages.original_text: "Well, officially we're a supply platoon. That is, we gather the resources that the Cage needs to survive. And each of us has to have some special skill. Like knowing about poisons, making ammo, or recharging power packs for las weapons. We're supply troops and that means we're the best of the best."
